strengths: Strong SQL and advanced query experience
Practical Python ETL and pipeline development
Proven dashboarding (Power BI, Tableau) with measurable impact
Experience building data models and large-scale analytics datasets
AI tool familiarity and automation-driven improvements
weaknesses: No explicit regression modeling or advanced statistical methods documented
improvement_bullets: Engineered scalable data models and transformed raw data into analytics-ready schemas using dbt and Python, establishing consistent metrics and improving data quality across GTM workflows.
Conducted comprehensive funnel analysis to map customer journey stages, identifying key conversion bottlenecks and driving actionable strategies to increase lead-to-opportunity ratios.
Developed self-service BI reporting in Tableau and Power BI, mirroring Looker’s exploration patterns to provide stakeholders with rapid, reliable visibility into revenue performance.
Leveraged statistical analysis, including multivariate regressions, to validate the impact of marketing initiatives on high-value customer acquisition and pipeline growth.
Managed large-scale data environments in BigQuery, optimizing SQL query performance and data structures to ensure sub-second latency for executive-level dashboards and ad-hoc reporting.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior GTM Data Analyst opportunity with Wiz. I am interested in this opportunity because Wiz’s position at the intersection of cloud security and AI-powered intelligence represents the cutting edge of the industry. What interests me about working for Wiz is its culture of empowering 'Wizards' to think creatively and act as autonomous owners; your approach to enabling hyper-growth through data-driven GTM strategies truly inspires me. I believe my advanced SQL and Python modeling skills, combined with my experience in automating operational workflows, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems as a business partner rather than just an analyst. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified that our onboarding process was a bottleneck to growth; I built an automated workflow via Zapier and revamped our data reporting to track customer segment performance. This reduced processing time by 40% and directly contributed to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Senior GTM Data Analyst role at Wiz would allow me to bring my data modeling and pipeline-building skills to help scale your GTM operations. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my stakeholder communication skills. I consistently translated complex technical insights into clear, executive-ready presentations that guided high-stakes resource reallocation. By documenting SOPs and automating manual reporting, I reduced new hire onboarding time by 50% and ensured consistent data-driven decision-making across the team. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my technical adaptability in working on complex GTM datasets at Wiz. I know that my analytical rigor and proactive approach to problem-solving align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior GTM Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
